subcodes.first_line: O Suleyman! His Holiness the Mahdi, like unto the lamp of guidance, was enkindled within the crystal of the Most Exalted One, and even as a moth circled round [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیمان حضرت مهدی چون سراج هدی در زجاج ملا اعلی برافروخت و چون پروانه حول
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @love of God
